F1 – Most useful feature: The per-category artifact differentiation — having bullet summaries for general emails and field extraction for financial ones is exactly how I'd want it. It maps well to how different email types actually get processed in a real workflow.
F2 – What to improve: I'd add a confidence score for classifications so users know when to double-check. Also, the ability to bulk-review and correct misclassifications in one pass would help during onboarding when the model is still learning your patterns.
F3 – Additional comments: The user-in-control approach is the right call — fully autonomous email handling would be too risky for most professional contexts. The plain-language preference setting is a nice touch that lowers the barrier for non-technical users.
